results.title: Senior AI and Data Engineer – Publicis Groupe
highlights:
# Senior AI and Data Engineer
...
Company descriptionPublicis Groupe is one of the largest communications groups in the world. We are building the agency model of the future and take a holistic approach to our clients' challenges. By fusing together our media, creative, data and technology expertise, we are able to provide clients with integrated solutions, transformative ideas and compelling consumer experiences. We call it the Power of One.We are proud winner of many awards and nominations, both in Sweden and internationally. But nothing makes us prouder than to work with clients and brands such as P&G, Disney, H&M, Mondelez, Volvo, VISA, Lantmännen, LEGO, Spotify, Perrigo, Renault and many more.At Publicis, we put our people first. We are proud to be certified by Great Place to Work (2022, 2023, 2024, 2025) and have won the Diversity Charter Sweden Awards in the category Mental Health (2025). We have also been recognized with a Magnet Award for our engaging culture (2023). Our goal is to become the leading workplace in our industry. We are based in a fantastic office in Odenplan and offer a flexible work policy. Overview As a Senior AI & Data Engineer at Publicis Intelligence, you will play a key role in our journey towards becoming a more AI-driven consulting and product organization. The role is highly hands-on and technical, while also having clear strategic impact. You will join a team with strong existing capabilities in data, analytics, MarTech and insights. Generative AI and agent-based solutions are the next major focus area in our development. You will take technical leadership within GenAI. This includes identifying opportunities, shaping solutions and driving implementations from idea to production. You will work closely with other agencies and technical stakeholders across the organization. Your mission is to design, build and deploy AI solutions that create real business value, both internally and for our clients. Internally, this means improving efficiency, automation, decision support and new ways of working. Externally, you will help develop AI-driven capabilities that strengthen our clients' businesses. You act as the bridge between business needs, strategic goals and technical delivery. You ensure that solutions are robust, scalable and commercially relevant. This role is based in Stockholm and involves close collaboration with teams in Sweden and Denmark, as well as with Publicis' global AI initiatives. Responsibilities
...
- You are responsible for developing and scaling AI and GenAI solutions that deliver clear, measurable business impact for both internal teams and clients. You own AI agents, copilots and LLM-based applications end to end, from design to production. The focus is on efficiency, scalability and the creation of new AI-driven products and services.
...
- Beyond hands-on delivery, you act as a technical advisor and enabler. You help teams and clients turn AI potential into concrete, implementable solutions. You also contribute to the development of new AI-driven products across data, analytics and MarTech.
...
- You play a key role in building AI maturity across the organization. This includes sharing knowledge, mentoring others and driving innovation within GenAI and MLOps. You help shape best practices that allow the organization to scale and evolve its AI capabilities over time.
...
- You have 5+ years of experience in Data Engineering, ML Engineering, Analytics Engineering, or similar technical roles, and are comfortable operating across the full lifecycle of data- and AI-drive systems.
...
- Extensive experience in designing data pipelines, and proficiency in SQL, Python, and spark.
...
- You have proven experience with cloud architecture and implementing scalable data infrastructure and solutions.
...
- You have a strong grasp of API design, system integration, and service-based architecture, and the ability to connect AI components into larger technical ecosystems.

results.title: Data Scientist – Publicis Groupe
highlights:
Data Scientist – Publicis Groupe
...
# Data Scientist
...
Publicis Groupe
...
## Beskrivning
...
Company descriptionPublicis Groupe is one of the largest communications groups in the world. We are building the agency model of the future and take a holistic approach to our clients' challenges. By fusing together our media, creative, data and technology expertise, we are able to provide clients with integrated solutions, transformative ideas and compelling consumer experiences. We call it the Power of One. We are proud winner of many awards and nominations, both in Sweden and internationally. But nothing makes us prouder than to work with clients and brands such as Disney, Elgiganten, Mondelez, Volvo, VISA, Lantmännen, Nomad Foods, Lactalis, Midsona, Renault and many more. At Publicis, we put our people first. We are proud to be certified by Great Place to Work (2022, 2023, 2024), and have been recognized with a Magnet Award for our engaging culture (2023). Our goal is to become the leading workplace in our industry. We are based in a fantastic office in Odenplan, but also offer a flexible work policy. OverviewJoin Publicis Intelligence - a dedicated team of specialists in data, technology, insights, and analytics! At Publicis Intelligence, we are looking for a talented Data Scientist to become part of our team and help drive business results for our clients. As a Data Scientist, you will play a central role in leveraging data to uncover actionable insights and develop models that enhance our marketing campaigns. You will collaborate closely with client teams and other marketing experts to identify growth opportunities, optimize performance, and deliver measurable results. Responsibilities: Data Analysis: Conduct in-depth analysis of large datasets to identify patterns, trends, and correlations relevant to marketing objectives. Model Development: Build and deploy models and algorithms to forecast customer behavior, optimize campaign targeting, and measure marketing effectiveness. Testing and Evaluation: Design and execute A/B testing and other experiments to continuously refine marketing strategies. Collaboration: Work closely with all team members to translate business questions into data-driven solutions. Client Relations: Build strong, trusted relationships with key clients. Stay Updated: Stay current with the latest advancements in data science, machine learning, and marketing technology. QualificationsBachelor's degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, Marketing, or a related field. Experience with cloud platforms (GCP and/or Azure). Proficiency in data analysis tools and programming languages (e.g., SQL, Python, R). Knowledge of machine learning algorithms. Understanding of statistical concepts. Familiarity with digital media concepts and metrics. Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills. Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
...
Publicis Groupe

results.title: Interpublic Group of Companies AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Interpublic Group (IPG) has positioned itself as an AI-forward advertising holding company through strategic investments, partnerships, and leadership appointments [1][2]. The company has integrated artificial intelligence across its operations through platforms like Interact, which amalgamates various technologies across the IPG portfolio including Acxiom's audience data [3]. IPG's CEO Philippe Krakowsky has been actively promoting AI adoption, noting that over 40% of IPG's global staff now use Interact [4]. The company's AI strategy includes partnerships with technology firms like Aaru for predictive simulations and Adobe for content creation, while also developing proprietary solutions like Agentic Systems for Commerce (ASC) [5][6]. Following its acquisition by Omnicom in November 2025, IPG's AI capabilities have been integrated into the new Omni platform, which now powers the world's largest advertising holding company [7].

results.title: Senior Director, AI Solutions Engineer at WPP Media · JobsRadar
highlights:
Senior Director, AI Solutions Engineer at WPP Media · JobsRadar
...
Jobs› Companies› WPP Media› Senior Director, AI Solutions Engineer
...
## About this Senior Director, AI Solutions Engineer role at WPP Media
...
WPP Media is WPP's AI-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.
...
The Media Futures Group AI Squad is a small, agile, and autonomous innovation team dedicated to charting the course for AI transformation across APAC for one of WPP’s most important and strategic global technology clients. By seamlessly integrating AI across media, creative, and production, this cross-functional squad delivers cutting-edge innovation and pioneering work to deliver more effective and efficient business outcomes. The team’s mission is to solve specific business challenges by delivering demonstrable proof of AI-enabled marketing improvements, providing strategic guideposts for the broader organization. Utilizing best-in-class tools like WPP Open and Gemini, you will innovate and deliver award-winning creative ideas while building, testing, and scaling solutions that enhance effectiveness, efficiency, and execution for our clients.
...
The AI Solutions Engineer serves as the master builder executing the construction. This highly technical role provides the dedicated, hands-on development support required to forcefully move theoretical architectural visions out of isolated testing environments and into highly secure, Google-approved, enterprise-grade production infrastructures. The AI Solutions Engineer bridges the critical, often perilous gap between a fragile, locally hosted prototype and a highly scalable, robust organizational tool capable of withstanding massive global traffic.
...
- Live Deployment & Debugging: Execute rapid debugging, performance analysis, and troubleshooting of both machine learning models and underlying cloud infrastructure in real-time to prevent catastrophic performance degradation or service outages during live campaign sprints.
...
- A minimum of 5 years of applied experience in software engineering, highly technical support, or complex solutions engineering.
...
- At least 2 years focused exclusively on deploying machine learning (ML) or natural language processing (NLP) applications in live commercial environments.
...
- Proven, hands-on experience troubleshooting, debugging, and reproducing obscure issues within advanced machine learning frameworks, specifically TensorFlow, Keras, and PyTorch.
...
- Vertex MLOps & Cloud Infrastructure Deployment: Capable of establishing robust, automated machine learning pipelines using Vertex AI Pipelines and Google Cloud Platform components like Kubernetes and Compute Engine. Must ensure that generative AI tools are properly containerized to scale securely and withstand massive global traffic during live campaigns.
...
- Vertex AI Mastery: Deep, hands-on proficiency with Google Cloud's Vertex AI platform as the exclusive, mandated environment for model deployment. Capable of navigating the Vertex Model Garden, configuring foundational models (like Gemini), and executing parameter-efficient fine-tuning for specific campaign needs
...
- Secure RAG & Grounding Pipeline Engineering: Expert ability to build complex Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures within Vertex AI. Must demonstrate high technical acumen in securely connecting generative models to highly guarded, proprietary enterprise data lakes and Customer Data Platforms without exposing PII or violating data governance.

highlights:
Principal Data Engineer - JAy! D Hub
...
Ingenious Lion · Portugal · Fully Remote
...
# Principal Data Engineer
...
Ingenious Lion is a Digital Tech Hub designed exclusively for Publicis Groupe, one of the world's leading marketing agencies.
...
As the marketing industry continues to drive digital transformation, Publicis Groupe empowers its clients with innovative data solutions and media ecosystems. Ingenious Lion has one mission: to partner with Publicis' global teams in creating innovative data and digital tech products that will shape the future.
...
A Sneak Peek at Your Future Role
...
As a Principal Data Engineer, you will set the technical direction for OneSuite data products and their integration into the Performics platform. This is a hands-on principal role: you will write code, design cross-repo architecture, lead high-stakes technical decisions, and raise the standards that other engineers use to build reliable, scalable systems.
...
You will help build the backend and data foundation behind AI-assisted analyst workflows, including agents built with the Claude Agent SDK, turning complex marketing data into dependable services, tools, and agent experiences that can answer questions, surface issues, and support campaign decisions securely across clients.
...
Working closely with product and data teams, you will own architecture across marketing data pipelines, connector systems, platform APIs, and agent/tool runtimes, ensuring systems are scalable, reliable, secure, and built to evolve.
...
architecture across marketing data pipelines, connector systems, platform APIs, agent/tool runtimes, and downstream product surfaces, defining durable domain boundaries and data contracts between warehouse outputs, platform APIs, agent tools, and user-facing workflows.
...
We're Thrilled to Have You Consider Joining Our Team. Here Are the Qualifications We're Seeking
...
At least ten years of experience in backend, data platform, or distributed systems, including ownership across multiple services or teams.
...
Expertise in Python, API design, service boundaries, async and concurrent systems, and modern testing practices.
...
Proficiency with Databricks, PySpark, Lakehouse patterns, and medallion-style data architecture, or equivalent large-scale data pipeline experience.
...
Strong AWS serverless experience, including Lambda, API Gateway, S3, IAM, and CloudFormation/SAM or equivalent infrastructure-as-code tooling.
...
Skills That Would Make You
...
You have knowledge of AI and LLM systems, agentic workflow integration, and MCP-style tool runtimes (experience with the Claude Agent SDK is a strong plus).
...
You are familiar with marketing, advertising, or platform
...

In a world where we have more computational power at our fingertips than ever before, it’s an approach that leads with human ingenuity and tech, so that our people can more effectively ‘train’ AI to get the best results for our clients.
...
Full Colour Media is underpinned by our proprietary Brand Patterns Growth Model, developed in partnership with Oxford University and Professor Felipe Thomaz , which incorporates research from over 10,000 brands and 5 million data points. It empowers brands to uncover their unique, nuanced patterns to stand out in a crowded market and unlock their growth potential.

results.title: VP, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services | CareerSync
highlights:
# VP, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services
...
About the Role & TeamIDC is seeking a transformative AI leader to define and execute our enterprise-wide AI strategy—embedding cutting-edge artificial intelligence across both internal operations and customer-facing products. This is a rare opportunity to shape how a global data and intelligence company harnesses AI, from agentic workflows and large language models to predictive analytics and AI-native product experiences. Reporting directly to the CTO, the VP of AI will lead a high-performing technical team, partner across business units, and drive measurable business impact through intelligent, responsible, and scalable AI solutions. The ideal candidate combines deep technical expertise in modern AI—including generative AI, LLMs, and agentic systems—with the strategic acumen to align AI investments to revenue growth and competitive differentiation. IDC sits at the intersection of proprietary data, expert human insight, and global technology reach—an ideal foundation for AI transformation. Key opportunity areas include: AI-augmented research & analyst productivity — deploying LLM-powered tools to accelerate data synthesis, report generation, and market forecasting. Intelligent data products — embedding predictive models and AI-driven insights directly into IDC's subscription and advisory offerings. Agentic content & marketing workflows — leveraging generative AI to personalize content, automate content pipelines, and optimize Foundry's MarTech capabilities. Enterprise AI infrastructure — building shared platforms, APIs, and MLOps practices that enable AI adoption at scale across all IDC business units. What You’ll Do
...
AI Strategy & Vision: Partner with the CEO, CTO, CIO, and business unit heads to define IDC's multi-year AI roadmap—spanning generative AI, agentic systems, predictive analytics, and AI-native product development. Technical Leadership: Architect and oversee IDC's AI platform and infrastructure, ensuring scalability, security, and alignment with enterprise data strategy. Product Delivery: Develop and execute IDC’s approach to agentic AI technology, thereby delivering the centerpiece of IDC Quanta, our cross-channel technology intelligence layer. Team Building: Recruit, develop, and retain a world-class AI team spanning ML engineers, data scientists, AI product managers, and MLOps specialists. Stakeholder Alignment: Translate complex AI capabilities into clear business value for executives and department heads; maintain transparent goals and resource planning. Ecosystem & Partnerships: Evaluate and manage AI technology partnerships, vendor relationships, and open-source contributions to accelerate IDC's AI capabilities. What You Bring
...
PhD. or Master's degree in Computer Science, AI/ML, Statistics, or a related quantitative field (or equivalent experience).
...
7+ years of experience in applied machine learning, AI engineering, or data science—with at least 3 years in senior technical leadership roles.
...
impact (revenue growth, cost reduction, or product differentiation).
...
Deep expertise in modern AI/ML and agentic/generative systems design.
...
Hands-on fluency with generative AI technologies: LLM fine-tuning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), prompt engineering, and agentic frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGen).
...
Strong engineering foundation: Python, SQL, cloud ML platforms (AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, or Azure ML), and modern MLOps practices (CI/CD, model monitoring, feature stores).
...
in media,
...
/intelligence, B2B SaaS, or MarTech industries.
...
Familiarity with knowledge graphs, semantic search, or AI applications in content and market research workflows.
...
Experience with responsible AI frameworks, model governance, and AI regulatory compliance (EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF).
...
Track record of building AI developer platforms or shared ML infrastructure used by multiple product teams.

results.title: Data Scientist | Careerport

time

 Position overview This position reports to the Director of Data Science; it will help to continue pushing forward the underlying models and data sets that create the AU, and work closely with product and client services team members to develop new data products and methodologies in support of all areas of the business. In this role, you will be joining a team of other data scientists and data engineers, and work with people across the organization to shape Adelaide’s data into a clear and concise story. You’ll be responsible for working with hundreds of millions of data points a day, quickly iterating on optimization methods that further advertising effectiveness and fuel the world’s first attention-based optimization platform. Day-to-day activities range from identifying and exploring new data sources, to training new models and iterating on existing models, to improving our codebase and pipelines. This is a fully remote position within the United States, with opportunities to connect with colleagues at our New York office. What you'll learn An important part of our culture is continuous learning and the open sharing of ideas. We offer: Access to a broad network of investors and advisors who can help you and your team succeed Mentorship from executives with decades of experience in adtech and media Regular internal knowledge-sharing sessions An education budget to support ongoing professional growth and development In this role you'll learn: Gain a deep understanding of attention metrics and media quality measurement Complex user interaction patterns and ML solutions to account for specialized data sets Methods for processing and deriving insights from massive amounts of user experience signals Best practices and collaborative product development in a fast-paced collaborative environment Core responsibilities Interpret raw data and form compelling narratives to draw meaningful insights that communicate our story and mission Work with our Data Science team, as well as Product and Client Services, to shape Adelaide’s data into a clear and concise story Help to formulate, develop, and optimize models in production Help to support and augment our machine learning system to aid advertisers in buying efficient media Support client management teams with data-driven insights based on millions of behavioral data points each day Work with the engineering team to build efficient and robust data pipelines Help direct experimental studies aimed at understanding advertising value across algorithms: logistic regression, linear regression, RandomForests/XGBoost, clustering methods, and dimensionality reduction (e.g., PCA) Ability to investigate and analyze model performance Root-cause analysis skills for debugging dataset issues Comfort explaining technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders Bachelor's degree in a quantitative discipline or equivalent professional experience similar BI tools Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in a quantitative field Intellectual curiosity and the ability to move fast while maintaining rigor Benefits Health & Wellness Medical, dental, and vision insurance Paid time off Parental leave Employee development & wellness stipend Holiday break Volunteer time off Financial & Compensation Competitive salary Performance-based quarterly bonus Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems
...
- A Typical Day:
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- Inference: Partner with inference data scientists to conduct rigorous quantitative analyses, applying working knowledge of causal inference to interpret results, assess impact, and identify gaps and opportunities to improve content quality and trust outcomes.
...
- Empowerment: Think strategically about how to scale and evolve Airbnb’s content integrity defenses, helping define the long-term vision for the role of AI-driven content understanding across the Trust ecosystem.
...
- Your Expertise:
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...

results.title: Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
highlights:
Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
...
# Data Scientist
...
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
...
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
...
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy advanced analytics, machine learning, and Generative AI solutions to address complex healthcare and business problems using largescale structured and unstructured data
...
- Applies advanced techniques including statistics
...
machine learning, simulation, and mathematical modelling
...
- Build and optimize LLM based applications, including Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks, to enable accurate, context aware, and explainable insights from enterprise healthcare data sources such as clinical notes, claims, provider data, and policy documents
...
- Develop, evaluate, and finetune machine learning and GenAI models, including prompt engineering, retrieval strategies, and model evaluation techniques to improve accuracy, relevance, and performance
...
- Translate complex analytical and GenAI outputs into clear, actionable insights for business stakeholders, product teams, and leadership to support data driven decision making
...
- Support prototyping, validation, and deployment of GenAI and ML solutions, working with engineering teams to ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and maintainable. Continuously stay current with advancements in LLMs, GenAI frameworks, and healthcare AI trends, contributing innovative ideas and improvements to Optum’s capabilities
...
### Required Qualifications:
...
- 4+ years of experience in handling/active development in data science projects
...
- 4+ years of experience in Microsoft Azure Cloud, Databricks, Mlflow, Spark SQL & Python
...
- Experience using Machine Learning Algorithms: Linear & Logistic Regression, Time Series analysis, Support Vector Machine, K-Means clustering, K-Nearest Neighbors Decision Trees, Random Forest, Naive Bayes, PCA, SVD, Artificial Neural Networks, Association Rules, Genetic Algorithm, Optimization, Bagging and Boosting algorithms etc.
...
- Understanding of data, schema, data model, machine learning and how to bring efficiency in big data related life cycle
...
- Proven skills to create opportunities using machine learning or artificial intelligence
...
Optum, part of UnitedHealth Group, is a global health services and technology company revolutionizing healthcare delivery through data analytics, pharmacy benefits, and digital health solutions that connect millions to better care. Headquartered in Eden Prairie, Minnesota, Optum serves patients, providers, payers, and pharmacies worldwide with innovative platforms for care optimization, claims processing, and population health management.
